mutations.description: Create the counting semaphore with a false initial token.
Expose a semaphore token before the queue contains the sample.
Read a queue item before acquiring its matching semaphore token.
Allow the worker to wait forever instead of preserving the three-tick latency bound.
Treat a cleared initialization flag as a usable pipeline.
Signal the semaphore even when the queue rejected a full send.
mutations.find:
if (status != RTOS_STATUS_OK) return status;
  return rtos_semaphore_give(pipeline->available);
mutations.replace:
if (status != RTOS_STATUS_OK) return rtos_semaphore_give(pipeline->available);
  return rtos_semaphore_give(pipeline->available);
